name: research-toolkit-skills
description: Cross-journal author workflow toolkit — venue selection, MCP execution bridge, submission-readiness self-check, simulated referee, response-to-referees, and replication-package assembly. Complements the per-journal depth packs.

plugins.name: research-toolkit-skills
plugins.description: Seven cross-journal author-workflow skills: rt-workflow router, rt-journal-match, rt-execution-bridge, rt-submission-readiness, rt-simulated-referee, rt-response-to-referees, rt-replication-package.
